info.title: Trakyo API
info.description: Public API for managing short links, custom domains, and click analytics.

get.description: Paginated list of short links owned by the authenticated user. Uses Stripe-style cursor pagination (`starting_after` / `ending_before` / `limit`).

post.description: Creates a new short link. Returns existing link (200) if same url + contentItemId + domain already exists (dedup). Returns 201 for new links.

404.description: Domain or content item not found

get.description: Get a single short link by its composite primary key (domainId + key).

patch.description: Partial update of a short link. Supports changing destination URL, slug, OG fields, and/or the append-tracking-param flag. At least one field required.

delete.description: Delete a short link and invalidate its KV cache. Returns the deleted link for confirmation.

get.summary: Get click count for a link
get.description: Returns click count with preset periods (`all`/`24h`/`7d`/`30d`/`90d`) or a custom ISO 8601 date range. `period=all` uses the O(1) denormalized counter.
Returns all shortlink domains available to the authenticated user, including the default `trakyo.link` domain. Each domain includes its link count.
